title: conyza dentonae
intro: Conyza dentonae, also known as Mexican fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, Conyza dentonae has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Conyza dentonae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
